productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men White Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteA sleek shoe with minimal overlays, this running shoe could also refine any casual outfit with its simple styling. If a sharp, contemporary look is what you're looking for then this is the right shoe for you. They look best when worn with a tonal polo tee and your tried-and-true favourite denims.Product DetailsWhite blunt toed shoe with orange and blue trims, has mesh inlaysPadded tongue and inner, has a pull loop at the heel collarTough midsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves and nubsMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
